conversation.text: Right, let's get this set up properly. Balance is £12,400. Salary hits on the 25th, usually £18k/month — consulting invoices random. Can you add my standing orders: rent £1,650 due 1st, tube pass £200 due 5th, therapy £180 due 15th, gym £95 due 23rd?
